---
title: ''
output: 
  html_document:
      self_contained: true
date: ""
---

```{r setup, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidycensus)
library(tidyverse)

# grab income data

turnout_all <- readRDS("data/turnout_all.rds")

income_data <- get_acs(
  geography = "county",
  variables = "B19013_001",
  state = c("WI", "MI", "IL", "OH", "IN"),
  year = 2024
)

# clean it 

income_clean <- income_data |>
  select(GEOID, estimate) |>
  rename(geoid = GEOID, median_income = estimate)

turnout_income <- turnout_all |>
  left_join(income_clean, by = "geoid")
```

```{r scatter, echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=7, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, out.width="100%"}

p <- ggplot(turnout_income, aes(x = median_income, y = turnout_rate)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 2, color = "#1a3a5c") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#e67e22", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::dollar) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(
    x = NULL, y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", family = "Georgia"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, family = "Georgia"),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#faf9f6", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#faf9f6", color = NA)
  )

p

ggsave("Turnout_Scatter.png", p)

```
